warnings: This is the second and final mechanical sheet (M-02 of 2), mirroring M-01's (หน้า65) floor-1 content but for floor 2 -- 4 bedrooms (นอน1-4), consistent with EE-06's electrical outlet plan for the same floor.

Grid callout on this sheet's dimension chain shows x-line labels '2,3,4,5' with spacing 0.60|4.00|2.00|3.00|0.50, i.e. the SAME spacing sequence as the grid master's x-lines '1,2,3,4' (4.00/2.00/3.00) but shifted up by one label -- likely an M-series sheet mislabeling (or a cropped view starting from a different reference), not a genuine 5th grid line. Not propagated to the grid master; flagged for human review. Y-axis labels (F,E,D,C,B,A, dims 1.00/2.00/3.70/2.20/3.70/1.80) match the grid master exactly.
3 WALL TYPE AC units at 18,000 BTU (นอน1, นอน2, นอน3) + 1 at 9,000 BTU (นอน4) -- matches the AC circuit breaker/wire sizing table given on EE-06 (หน้า64).

This mechanical ventilation-placement sheet is advisory/recommended fan placement only, not a structural or electrical circuit drawing -- consistent with M-01 and houses #3/#4's equivalent M-series sheets.
